cards.title: ClickUp Replaces Hundreds with AI Agents
cards.body: The nine-year-old startup is conducting mass layoffs to replace hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents. This signals a major shift in how companies are approaching workforce automation.

cards.title: Pope's AI Encyclical Warns of Concentrated Power
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to examine concentrated power and eroding democracy. The document critiques how a tech elite shapes the world to its own advantage.

cards.title: Startup Battlefield 200 Applications Close May 27
cards.body: Apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 before the May 27 deadline to access VCs and global visibility. Winners receive $100,000 and TechCrunch coverage.

cards.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird Savings End
cards.body: Save up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes before May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now in San Francisco before prices increase.

cards.title: AI Security Navigation Remains Real-Time Challenge
cards.body: All organizations, including Google, are navigating AI security in real time during this transition period. The landscape is evolving faster than established protocols.

cards.title: Amazon's Bee Wearable Sparks Privacy Concerns
cards.body: Amazon's Bee wearable offers convenience but raises significant privacy anxiety concerns. Like other AI wearables, it presents a trade-off between utility and data exposure.

cards.title: Ferrari and IBM Redefine F1 Fan Experience
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are using IBM's AI to create F1 superfans. The partnership redefines how fans engage with the sport through AI-powered personalization.

cards.title: Elon Musk Abandons Solar Power for Natural Gas
cards.body: xAI has committed to natural gas infrastructure while SpaceX pursues orbital data centers. Musk's shift contradicts his earlier promise of a 'solar-electric economy.'

cards.title: AI Reconstructs Dead Pilots' Voices From Recordings
cards.body: Researchers used AI on cockpit spectrograms to reconstruct pilot voices, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block docket system access. The incident raises new ethical questions about AI reconstruction.

cards.title: Google Adds Disco Ball Icons to Pixel
cards.body: Google now lets users disco ball-ify their entire Pixel home screen. The playful update adds customization options to the mobile interface.

cards.title: AI Startups Inflate ARR Metrics with VC Awareness
cards.body: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when reporting progress publicly. Investors are fully aware of these inflated 'ARR' figures.

cards.title: SpaceX Files for $1.75 Trillion IPO
cards.body: SpaceX's S-1 filing reveals a $28 trillion total addressable market and a pay package tied to establishing a Mars colony. The 36-page risk factor section alone underscores the company's ambitious scope.

cards.title: Google Search Breaks on Word 'Disregard'
cards.body: Google Search's latest AI update now breaks the search interface when users search for the word 'disregard.' The bug highlights unexpected consequences of AI-driven search overhauls.

cards.title: Google Demos Android XR Glasses with Gemini
cards.body: Google showcased prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and information directly into your field of view. The technology is 'almost there' according to early demos.

cards.title: Spotify Enables AI-Generated Covers with Universal
cards.body: Spotify partnered with Universal Music Group to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists receive a share of the revenue from fan-made content.

cards.title: Six Search Engines Worth Trying Now
cards.body: With Google's AI overhaul changing search fundamentally, alternatives are worth exploring. Several search engines now offer non-AI-dominated options for users dissatisfied with AI overview features.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump delayed signing an AI security executive order that would require pre-release government reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as a 'blocker.'

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Q&A and Briefing Features
cards.body: Spotify is adding AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation to podcasts. Users can now generate daily or weekly briefs based on custom prompts.

cards.title: Spotify Launches NotebookLM Competitor App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop research app as a preview in over 20 markets. The app directly competes with Google's NotebookLM for audio research capabilities.

cards.title: ClickUp Replaces Hundreds of Workers With AI Agents
cards.body: The nine-year-old startup is laying off hundreds of employees and replacing them with thousands of AI agents. This signals a major shift in how companies view workforce automation and AI integration.

cards.title: Everyone Navigating AI Security in Real Time
cards.body: The transition period for AI security is underway, with all companies—including Google—working through challenges in real time. Security practices are evolving faster than best practices can be established.

cards.title: Amazon's AI Wearable Bee Offers Convenience and Privacy Concerns
cards.body: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee combines practical convenience with significant privacy trade-offs. Users must weigh the benefits against the data collection implications.

cards.title: Ferrari Uses IBM AI to Create F1 Superfans
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are redefining the fan experience with AI technology. The partnership is reshaping how sports teams engage with their audiences.

cards.title: AI Reconstructs Voices of Dead Pilots From Recordings
cards.body: People used AI on spectrograms of cockpit recordings to reconstruct pilot voices, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block docket system access. The incident highlights ethical concerns around voice recreation technology.

cards.title: Google Search's AI Update Breaks the Word 'Disregard'
cards.body: After Google Search's recent AI overhaul, searching for 'disregard' effectively breaks the interface. The glitch reveals fragility in AI-powered search implementations.

cards.title: Google's AI Glasses Demo Shows Near-Ready AR Potential
cards.body: Google demonstrated Android XR prototype glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and information into your field of view. The technology is advancing closer to consumer-ready features.

cards.title: VCs and Founders Inflate 'ARR' on AI Startups
cards.body: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when discussing progress publicly, with investors fully aware of the practice. The trend shows how AI hype can distort financial reporting.

cards.title: Spotify Partners With Universal for AI Cover Generation
cards.body: Spotify and Universal Music Group are allowing Premium subscribers to create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Artists whose work is used will receive a share of the revenue.

cards.title: Google Isn't Really Google Anymore, Search Alternatives Emerge
cards.body: As Google's AI overview feature dominates Search, alternatives are gaining attention from users dissatisfied with the changes. The shift signals potential fragmentation in search market dominance.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order Over Language
cards.body: President Trump delayed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's specific language.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Q&A and Briefing Features to Podcasts
cards.body: Spotify is enabling users to generate daily or weekly briefs from podcasts using AI prompts. The feature enhances how listeners consume and personalize podcast content.

cards.title: Spotify Challenges Google NotebookLM With New App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop app as a research preview in over 20 markets, competing directly with Google's NotebookLM. The app demonstrates Spotify's expanding AI ambitions beyond audio.

cards.title: Anthropic's Code with Claude Shows Coding's AI Future
cards.body: At Anthropic's developer event in London, Code with Claude demonstrated how AI will shape software development going forward. The event showcased advanced AI capabilities for programmers.

cards.title: Google I/O: AI Science Path Is Shifting Dramatically
cards.body: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis proclaimed we're 'in the foothills of the singularity' during Google I/O. The keynote highlighted AI's accelerating role in scientific discovery.

cards.title: Can AI Learn to Understand the World?
cards.body: AI companies are building systems to understand the external world and overcome LLM limitations through world models. Recent developments bring world models to the forefront of AI discussion.

cards.title: Scaling Creativity in the Age of AI
cards.body: Technology continues to shape how humans tell stories, from natural pigments to digital distribution. AI is now becoming central to how creativity is scaled and shared.

cards.title: Pope Leo Cites Gandalf, Calls to Disarm AI
cards.body: The Pope invoked Tolkien's wizard in his AI encyclical, framing AI as a power that must be controlled. The religious perspective adds moral dimensions to AI governance debates.

cards.title: US Scrambles to Stop Recreating Dead Pilots' Voices
cards.body: The US government is moving to prevent people from using AI to reconstruct voices of deceased pilots from cockpit recordings. The incident raises urgent questions about voice synthesis regulation.

cards.title: Trump Abruptly Cancels EO Signing After AI CEO Boycott
cards.body: President Trump cancelled an executive order signing event after major AI firm CEOs declined to attend. The snub suggests tension between the administration and AI industry leadership.
